description_long: This house is a large, multi-story residential building with a modern, blocky architectural style. The exterior is predominantly white, with flat roofs featuring blue skylights and rooftop terraces. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway and includes several trees and landscaped greenery at the front and sides. The rear of the house features a parking area with multiple cars and a fenced boundary. Windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and others in vertical strips. The main entryway is marked by a set of steps leading to a recessed door, flanked by greenery and partially sheltered by the building's overhang.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with flat roofs, white exterior, blue skylights, landscaped greenery, and a rear parking area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped trees, and the building's white facade with blue skylights.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the driveway, additional greenery, and the building's blocky structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the parking area with cars, fenced boundary, and multiple windows on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway wrapping around, steps leading up, and more rooftop details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door accessed by steps, flanked by landscaped greenery and partially sheltered by an overhang
